// Code generated by cleanproto. DO NOT EDIT.
//
// Minimal protobuf wire reader/writer. This replaces the runtime dependency on
// protobufjs/minimal: only the subset of the protobuf wire format that
// cleanproto emits is implemented. 64-bit integers are surfaced as bigint and
// strings use the platform TextEncoder/TextDecoder.

const textEncoder = new TextEncoder();
const textDecoder = new TextDecoder();
const scratch = new ArrayBuffer(8);
const scratchView = new DataView(scratch);
const scratchBytes = new Uint8Array(scratch);

export type Int64Input = number | string | bigint;

function toBigInt(value: Int64Input): bigint {
  if (typeof value === "bigint") return value;
  if (typeof value === "string") return BigInt(value);
  return BigInt(Math.trunc(value));
}

export class Writer {
  private buf: Uint8Array = new Uint8Array(64);
  // Number of bytes written so far. Public to match protobufjs: generated code
  // reads `writer.len` to skip emitting empty packed repeated fields.
  len = 0;
  private stack: Array<{ buf: Uint8Array; len: number }> = [];

  static create(): Writer {
    return new Writer();
  }

  private ensure(extra: number): void {
    const need = this.len + extra;
    if (need <= this.buf.length) return;
    let cap = this.buf.length * 2;
    while (cap < need) cap *= 2;
    const next = new Uint8Array(cap);
    next.set(this.buf.subarray(0, this.len));
    this.buf = next;
  }

  private pushByte(b: number): void {
    this.ensure(1);
    this.buf[this.len++] = b & 0xff;
  }

  private pushBytes(bytes: Uint8Array): void {
    this.ensure(bytes.length);
    this.buf.set(bytes, this.len);
    this.len += bytes.length;
  }

  private writeVarint32(value: number): void {
    let v = value >>> 0;
    while (v > 0x7f) {
      this.pushByte((v & 0x7f) | 0x80);
      v >>>= 7;
    }
    this.pushByte(v);
  }

  private writeVarint64(value: bigint): void {
    let v = BigInt.asUintN(64, value);
    while (v > 0x7fn) {
      this.pushByte(Number(v & 0x7fn) | 0x80);
      v >>= 7n;
    }
    this.pushByte(Number(v));
  }

  uint32(value: number): this {
    this.writeVarint32(value);
    return this;
  }

  int32(value: number): this {
    if (value < 0) {
      this.writeVarint64(BigInt(value)); // negative values sign-extend to 10 bytes
    } else {
      this.writeVarint32(value);
    }
    return this;
  }

  sint32(value: number): this {
    this.writeVarint32(((value << 1) ^ (value >> 31)) >>> 0);
    return this;
  }

  int64(value: Int64Input): this {
    this.writeVarint64(toBigInt(value));
    return this;
  }

  uint64(value: Int64Input): this {
    this.writeVarint64(toBigInt(value));
    return this;
  }

  sint64(value: Int64Input): this {
    const v = toBigInt(value);
    this.writeVarint64((v << 1n) ^ (v >> 63n));
    return this;
  }

  bool(value: boolean): this {
    this.pushByte(value ? 1 : 0);
    return this;
  }

  fixed32(value: number): this {
    this.ensure(4);
    this.buf[this.len++] = value & 0xff;
    this.buf[this.len++] = (value >>> 8) & 0xff;
    this.buf[this.len++] = (value >>> 16) & 0xff;
    this.buf[this.len++] = (value >>> 24) & 0xff;
    return this;
  }

  sfixed32(value: number): this {
    return this.fixed32(value | 0);
  }

  fixed64(value: Int64Input): this {
    let v = BigInt.asUintN(64, toBigInt(value));
    this.ensure(8);
    for (let i = 0; i < 8; i++) {
      this.buf[this.len++] = Number(v & 0xffn);
      v >>= 8n;
    }
    return this;
  }

  sfixed64(value: Int64Input): this {
    return this.fixed64(value);
  }

  float(value: number): this {
    scratchView.setFloat32(0, value, true);
    this.pushBytes(scratchBytes.subarray(0, 4));
    return this;
  }

  double(value: number): this {
    scratchView.setFloat64(0, value, true);
    this.pushBytes(scratchBytes.subarray(0, 8));
    return this;
  }

  string(value: string): this {
    const bytes = textEncoder.encode(value);
    this.writeVarint32(bytes.length);
    this.pushBytes(bytes);
    return this;
  }

  bytes(value: Uint8Array): this {
    this.writeVarint32(value.length);
    this.pushBytes(value);
    return this;
  }

  fork(): this {
    this.stack.push({ buf: this.buf, len: this.len });
    this.buf = new Uint8Array(64);
    this.len = 0;
    return this;
  }

  ldelim(): this {
    const child = this.buf.subarray(0, this.len);
    const parent = this.stack.pop();
    if (parent === undefined) {
      throw new Error("cleanproto runtime: ldelim() without matching fork()");
    }
    this.buf = parent.buf;
    this.len = parent.len;
    this.writeVarint32(child.length);
    this.pushBytes(child);
    return this;
  }

  finish(): Uint8Array {
    return this.buf.slice(0, this.len);
  }
}

export class Reader {
  buf: Uint8Array;
  pos: number;
  len: number;
  private view: DataView;

  constructor(buf: Uint8Array) {
    this.buf = buf;
    this.pos = 0;
    this.len = buf.length;
    this.view = new DataView(buf.buffer, buf.byteOffset, buf.byteLength);
  }

  static create(buf: Uint8Array): Reader {
    return new Reader(buf);
  }

  private readVarint(): bigint {
    let result = 0n;
    let shift = 0n;
    for (;;) {
      const b = this.buf[this.pos++];
      result |= BigInt(b & 0x7f) << shift;
      if ((b & 0x80) === 0) break;
      shift += 7n;
    }
    return BigInt.asUintN(64, result);
  }

  uint32(): number {
    return Number(this.readVarint() & 0xffffffffn) >>> 0;
  }

  int32(): number {
    return Number(BigInt.asIntN(32, this.readVarint()));
  }

  sint32(): number {
    const n = this.readVarint() & 0xffffffffn;
    return Number(BigInt.asIntN(32, (n >> 1n) ^ -(n & 1n)));
  }

  int64(): bigint {
    return BigInt.asIntN(64, this.readVarint());
  }

  uint64(): bigint {
    return this.readVarint();
  }

  sint64(): bigint {
    const n = this.readVarint();
    return (n >> 1n) ^ -(n & 1n);
  }

  bool(): boolean {
    return this.readVarint() !== 0n;
  }

  fixed32(): number {
    const v = this.view.getUint32(this.pos, true);
    this.pos += 4;
    return v;
  }

  sfixed32(): number {
    const v = this.view.getInt32(this.pos, true);
    this.pos += 4;
    return v;
  }

  fixed64(): bigint {
    const v = this.view.getBigUint64(this.pos, true);
    this.pos += 8;
    return v;
  }

  sfixed64(): bigint {
    const v = this.view.getBigInt64(this.pos, true);
    this.pos += 8;
    return v;
  }

  float(): number {
    const v = this.view.getFloat32(this.pos, true);
    this.pos += 4;
    return v;
  }

  double(): number {
    const v = this.view.getFloat64(this.pos, true);
    this.pos += 8;
    return v;
  }

  string(): string {
    const length = this.uint32();
    const value = textDecoder.decode(this.buf.subarray(this.pos, this.pos + length));
    this.pos += length;
    return value;
  }

  bytes(): Uint8Array {
    const length = this.uint32();
    const value = this.buf.slice(this.pos, this.pos + length);
    this.pos += length;
    return value;
  }

  skipType(wireType: number): void {
    switch (wireType) {
      case 0: // varint
        while (this.buf[this.pos++] & 0x80) {
          /* consume continuation bytes */
        }
        break;
      case 1: // 64-bit
        this.pos += 8;
        break;
      case 2: {
        // length-delimited
        const length = this.uint32();
        this.pos += length;
        break;
      }
      case 3: // start group
        for (;;) {
          const tag = this.uint32();
          const innerWire = tag & 7;
          if (innerWire === 4) break; // end group
          this.skipType(innerWire);
        }
        break;
      case 5: // 32-bit
        this.pos += 4;
        break;
      default:
        throw new Error("cleanproto runtime: invalid wire type " + wireType);
    }
  }
}
